name: legal-toolkit
description: In-house legal toolkit for Taiwan SMEs — contract review, playbook negotiation, drafting, research.

interface.shortDescription: In-house legal toolkit for Taiwan SMEs — review, draft, negotiate, research
interface.longDescription: Cover the in-house legal workflow for Taiwan SMEs: contract review, issue-spotting, playbook-driven negotiation authoring, document drafting, legal research, and incident response. using-legal-toolkit routes the seven skills; the toolkit defers substantive legal decisions to the user rather than rendering judgments.
defaultPrompt: Review this contract and flag risky clauses.
Draft an NDA for a vendor engagement.
Spot the legal issues in this situation.
